--- a/read_source.py
+++ b/read_source.py
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+import os

+os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

+

+path = '/opt/habitat-lab-src/habitat-lab/habitat/tasks/rearrange/social_nav/social_nav_sensors.py'

+with open(path) as f:

+    lines = f.readlines()

+

+# Print lines 460-600 to get the full SocialNavSeekSuccess class

+for i, line in enumerate(lines[460:600], start=461):

+    print(f"{i:4d}: {line}", end='')
